w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh wp14

w:r.w:t: Peckers is a premium Quick-service restaurant based in the United Kingdom, speciali

rilled chicken. We are dedicated to serving the best chicken in Hertfordshire by focusing on high-quality ingredients, bold flavours, and fast, friendly service. Whether you are looking for a quick takeaway or a hot delivery to your door, we pride ourselves on providing

We are a growing independent brand! Currently, we have two flagship sites in Hitchin and Stevenage, and we are excited to be expanding further across the region. Even as we grow, we remain a community-based business at heart. Our focus is always on putting our customers first and ensuring every neighbourhood we join gets the same seriously good chicken and friendly service we are known for.
What makes Peckers different from other chicken shops?

Peckers stands out by combining the speed of a quick-service restaurant (QSR) with the gourmet taste and quality you’d expect from premium chicken brands. We focus on bold flavours, high-quality ingredients, and our signature
sauces that you won't find anywhere else. Most importantly, we are obsessed with customer service
ensuring every guest gets a friendly, top-tier experience whether they are dining in, taking away, or ordering
What do you serve at Peckers?

We are specialists in both fried and grilled chicken. Our signature fried chicken is made using our own unique, secret-recipe breading for the perfect crunch every time. We also offer a premium PERI-PERI grilled chicken range for those looking for a flame-grilled alternative. To round off your meal, don't miss our special milkshakes, thick, creamy, and the perfect partner to our seriously good chicken.
Is the chicken at Peckers Halal?

Yes, it is! We are proud to be a fully Halal-friendly chicken shop. We use only Halal-certified chicken across all our stores, ensuring that everyone in our community can enjoy our seriously good chicken.
Is the food at Peckers fresh?
Absolutely. To ensure our chicken never goes dry, we cook in small fresh batches throughout the day. Whether you walk through our doors at lunch or late at night, you are promised

hicken that is fresh, succulent, and cooked to order. By using industry-leading Henny Penny pressure fryers, we lock in the moisture of every tender and fillet, delivering a perfect crunch and juicy finish across all our stores every single time.
Do you offer grilled chicken, or is everything fried?
We offer both! While we are famous for our crunch, we also have a popular PER

PERI grilled chicken range for those looking for a flame-grilled alternative. Our grilled chicken comes in a variety of delicious flavours to suit every palate, from smoky BBQ and zesty Lemon & Herb to our signature Mild, Hot, and Extra Hot spices. Whether you want it crispy or grilled, we ensure
Do you make your own sauces?
Yes, all our sauces are made in-house daily using fresh ingredients. We never use added preservatives, ensuring every dip is as fresh and flavourful as the chicken it's served with.
What are the most popular items on the menu?

While everything we make is a hit, our fans definitely have their favourites! The OG Burger is our classic go-to, while the Murgar on the Dance Floor is a must-try for those looking for something unique and
. Our Special Milkshakes are the ultimate treat to pair with any meal, and our New Grilled
Range has quickly become a top choice for those who love a flame-grilled, PER
Are there vegetarian options at Peckers?

Yes! While we are chicken specialists, we have a fantastic range of meat-free options so that everyone can enjoy the Peckers experience. Our Peckerless range features a delicious, crispy, vegetarian soy-based patty that can be swapped into our most popular burgers, wraps, rice bowls, and salad bowls.
You can find us at 25 John Barker Place, Hitchin, SG5 2PD. We are located in the heart of the Westmill community and are proud to be a local favourite in the area.
Peckers Stevenage is located at 46 Hertford Rd, Bragbury End, Stevenage SG2 8ED. This store features our modern, vibrant interior, making it a great spot to sit in and eat or grab a quick takeaway.
Yes, we choose our locations with convenience in mind, and there are parking options available at all our stores.
Can I eat in at Peckers?
Yes, you can! We offer a welcoming dine-in experience across our stores, designed with a modern and vibrant atmosphere.
Whether you are looking for a quick lunch break or a relaxed meal with friends and family, our seating areas are built for comfort.
What is the best way to order from Peckers?

For the best value and experience, we recommend ordering directly through our official website. To welcome you to the community, we offer an exclusive 15% discount on your first order when you buy directly from us, ensuring you get the best deal available. While our website is the most rewarding way to order, we are also fully available on Just Eat, Uber Eats, and Deliveroo across all our stores to make getting your meal as convenient as possible.
We are open every day of the week at our Hitchin branch.
Our Stevenage store offers slightly earlier opening times and remains open later on the weekends.
Do you offer delivery or just takeaway?

We offer in-store service, Click & Collect, and delivery across all our stores. Ordering directly through our website is the best way to choose your service and grab a 15% discount on your first order.
Does Peckers offer any meal deals?
Yes! We offer daily lunch deals at all our stores until 3:00 PM. These deals start at 11:30 AM in Stevenage and 12:00 PM in Hitchin, offering a great way to enjoy our menu for less.
Do you have a loyalty program?
Yes, we do! Join our loyalty program to get a free milkshake just for signing up. You can then start collecting
3rd & 6th Chicken Head: Get a free side and a free main.
10th Chicken Head: Your meal is on the house.
It’s our way of rewarding our regulars across all our stores with seriously good perks.
Can I order Peckers for an event or party?

Yes, we cater for events and parties! Simply visit peckerschicken.co.uk/locations and fill out the enquiry form. A member of our team will get back to you soon to help plan your perfect Peckers spread.
You can contact us directly by phone at either of our locations. For Peckers Stevenage, you can reach us at 07879 512344, and for Peckers Hitchin, the number is 07599 828199.
